name: Sonelius Smith
abstract: Sonelius Smith (born December 17, 1942) is known both for his innovative contributions to jazz as composer and pianist and for his collaborations with some of the late twentieth century's greatest jazz musicians. As a composer, Smith has created work performed by pianists Ahmad Jamal and Stanley Cowell and saxophonists David Murray and R…

about_quotes.speaker: Arturo O'Farrill
about_quotes.evidence: musicians, older musicians would go there and hang out all day. People like Sonelius Smith, Jimmy Vass, Clarence Sharp — I mean these were places and they would just hang out all day long just jamming and playing... And we would go.
about_quotes.doc_title: Arturo O'Farrill interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, May 6, 2024
